segments.text: I told you not to hang up. Why did you hang up?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Manek, listen. I haven't told you to hang up. There are three-four more questions, please answer them. Okay? Then your case will be closed.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you taken any medication or medicine that lasted for two consecutive weeks, or have you ever been referred to a specialist?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any treatment consultation or investigation like blood, CT, MRI, X-ray ever?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Huh? You've never had a blood, CT, MRI, X-ray, right? No? Okay. Do you have any difficulty performing daily activities?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Your daily tasks, whatever you do throughout the day, do you have any difficulty doing them?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, no, the daily activity, the work you do, whatever work you do, do you ever have a problem doing it?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, what problem would I have with this? I have to do my own work myself.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Any work, for example, when you wake up, you go to work, do you have any problem doing any work?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Have you ever taken leave from work for two consecutive weeks?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Went somewhere for a trip because of that?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Oh sir, not for travel, only health related.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: You got sick, so you took two weeks off from work for that? Like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Do you have any congenital defect or disorder or hereditary disease like a family disease, like cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, or poliomyelitis? Do you have any such condition?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you or your wife received any test or treatment or any medical advice or counseling for sexually transmitted diseases like HIV or AIDS?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Do you feel your weight is decreasing without reason or that you have any signs or symptoms in your body for which medical advice or a visit to the doctor is needed for treatment?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, I don't know about all that.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: No, meaning you don't feel anything like that in your body, right? You don't feel like you have any problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, okay. Is any surgery planned for you in the future?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Thank you, Manek. You can hang up the call now.
segments.speaker: doctor
